notes: 8 clicks < destructive floor 50 -> abstain, do not pause on noise. Pins the insufficient_evidence abstention pattern (Gate 2 thin-data floor).

600 clicks, 6 conv (>= destructive floor 50/5), cpa 350 = 3.5x vs 100, 9 daily breach days. At 3.5x CPA the engine emits BOTH add_creative AND pause; the reduced `primary` label is recommendations[0].action = add_creative (pushed first), and expectedActions pins that BOTH are produced so a dropped pause fails the eval. Gate-2 proof of the positive case: durable + sufficient volume -> Riley ACTS (no abstention), the inverse of suff-thin-data-watch.
